sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الثِّيَابُ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةُ جُزْءًا مُهِمًّا مِنَ الثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Tradicionalna odjeća je važan dio arapske kulture.
sentences.translationEn: Traditional clothing is an important part of Arab culture.

sentences.arabic: يَلْبَسُ الرِّجَالُ فِي دُوَلِ الْخَلِيجِ الثَّوْبَ الأَبْيَضَ وَالشُّمَاغَ.
sentences.translation: Muškarci u državama Zaliva nose bijelu dishdabu i shmagh.
sentences.translationEn: Men in Gulf countries wear the white thobe and shemagh.

sentences.arabic: تَرْتَدِي الْمَرْأَةُ الْعَبَاءَةَ وَتَتَفَاوَتُ أَشْكَالُهَا بَيْنَ الدُّوَلِ.
sentences.translation: Žena nosi abayu, čiji se oblici razlikuju između zemalja.
sentences.translationEn: Women wear the abaya, which varies in style between countries.

sentences.arabic: فِي بِلَادِ الْمَغْرِبِ يَلْبَسُ الرِّجَالُ الْجَلَابِيَّةَ وَالنِّسَاءُ الْقَفْطَانَ.
sentences.translation: U sjevernoafričkim zemljama muškarci nose džalabiju, a žene kaftan.
sentences.translationEn: In North African countries men wear the djellaba and women the kaftan.

sentences.arabic: الثِّيَابُ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةُ تَعْكِسُ هُوِيَّةَ كُلِّ مِنْطَقَةٍ وَتَارِيخَهَا.
sentences.translation: Tradicionalna odjeća odražava identitet i historiju svake regije.
sentences.translationEn: Traditional clothing reflects the identity and history of each region.
